data.description: THERANOS FOUNDER ELIZABETH HOLMES ASKS TRUMP FOR PARDON

data.title: U.S. Hemp Roundtable leads 100+ meetings on Capitol Hill, urging extensions crucial for 2026 planting season.
data.description: Over 100 meetings were organized by the U.S. Hemp Roundtable (USHR) as industry leaders, farmers, and advocates gathered in Washington, D.C. to engage with lawmakers. The focus was on crucial extensions needed for the upcoming 2026 planting season. The meetings aimed to discuss legislative matters that are vital for the industry's growth and development. This initiative highlights the significance of collaboration between stakeholders and policymakers in shaping the future of hemp production in the United States.

data.title: Suburban Propane Partners, L.P. (NYSE:SPH) to hold fiscal 2026 first quarter results conference call at 9:00 AM on Feb 5, 2026.
data.description: Whippany, New Jersey - Suburban Propane Partners, L.P. (NYSE:SPH) revealed today the upcoming Fiscal 2026 First Quarter Results Conference Call set for February 5, 2026, at 9:00 AM EST. This call will be open to analysts, investors, and other interested parties.

data.title: GE Aerospace's stock rises into buy zone ahead of Q4 earnings announcement. The article suggests a positive outlook.
data.description: GE Aerospace announced their Q4 earnings on Thursday. Prior to the announcement, GE stock experienced a significant increase on Wednesday, entering a buy zone. This surge was notable as the stock rebounded to a key buy point. The news was shared by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Trump won't increase tariffs, plans to negotiate for Greenland; S&P 500 rises after Davos speech.
data.description: In his address at Davos, President Donald Trump expressed his intention to engage in prompt discussions for obtaining Greenland, emphasizing that force will not be employed. Following this announcement, there will be no increase in tariffs as part of the Greenland 'framework'. This news resulted in a significant surge of the S&P 500.

data.title: FSK (NYSE: FSK) to release Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 25, 2026. Conference call details to follow.
data.description: In Philadelphia and New York, on January 21, 2026, FS KKR Capital Corp. (NYSE: FSK) revealed its intention to disclose the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 following the market close on the New York Stock Exchange on Wednesday, February 25, 2026. FSK will conduct its fourth-quarter briefing, providing further details on its performance.

data.title: Dow Jones up as Trump cancels Europe tariffs at Davos. Netflix stock down on earnings. Schwab influenced.
data.description: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a boost as President Trump delivered remarks at the Davos conference. However, Netflix faced a significant drop in its stock value following its earnings report. The stock market today saw the Dow climbing sharply after Trump's announcement of calling off tariffs on European goods. Charles Schwab also had a notable influence on the market.

data.title: Rayonier to release Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 11, with conference call on Feb 12. Info available at www.rayonier.com.
data.description: The forestry company Rayonier Inc. (NYSE:RYN) intends to announce its Q4 2025 financial results after the market closes on February 11, 2026. Following this, a conference call and live audio webcast are scheduled for 10:00 a.m. (ET) on February 12 to analyze the outcomes. Interested parties can access supplementary materials and the live webcast at www.rayonier.com. A replay of the webcast will be stored on the company’s website for future reference.

data.title: Elucidata unveils AI Lab for Biomedical AGI research. Launch aims to advance Artificial General Intelligence in R&D.
data.description: Elucidata unveiled the opening of an AI Lab in San Francisco, concentrating on Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) in various Biomedical R&D sectors.

data.title: UDR reported 2025 tax treatment of distributions, including per share figures and Form 1099-DIV box numbers.
data.description: UDR, Inc. disclosed the tax status of its 2025 distributions to shareholders. Each share received distributions outlined as follows:- Total Ordinary Dividends per share: Box 1a- Qualified Dividends per share: Box 1b- Total Capital Gain Distributions per share: Box 2a- Unrecaptured Sec. 1250 per share: Box 2bThe company, listed on NYSE as UDR, is a prominent multifamily real estate investment trust. Shareholders' Record Date and Payment Date were specified for the 2025 distributions.

data.title: Mark Augdahl appointed CFO at Apogee Enterprises, Inc. (Nasdaq: APOG) after serving as Interim CFO since Jan 7, 2026.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Apogee Enterprises, Inc. (Nasdaq: APOG) revealed that Mark Augdahl has been named the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Augdahl, who took on the role of Interim CFO on January 7, 2026, has transitioned into this position immediately. Donald Nolan, the Chief Executive Officer, expressed his satisfaction with the appointment, stating, "Mark has been a key figure at Apogee for numerous years and we are happy to have him as our CFO."

data.title: Researchers at FIU are developing personalized cancer treatment, showing promise for hard-to-treat diseases, aided by philanthropic investment.
data.description: In Miami on January 21, 2026, researchers at Florida International University (FIU) are making strides in tailoring cancer treatment to individual patients, demonstrating encouraging outcomes for individuals with difficult-to-treat cancers. This innovative approach is bolstered by recent philanthropic funding, which is facilitating the expansion of research in this area. The personalized cancer treatment has yielded promising results for patients, marking a significant advancement in the field.

data.title: CACI reports Q2 results for fiscal 2026, with strong revenue growth and EBITDA margin. Raises guidance for all metrics.
data.description: In Reston, Virginia, CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) disclosed its fiscal second-quarter outcomes for the period ending December 31, 2025. The company highlighted its achievements in executing strategy and showcasing distinctive abilities. They reported robust results with noteworthy metrics including a solid EBITDA margin, healthy free cash flow due to substantial revenue growth. Jo, the company spokesperson, emphasized the commitment to shareholders and catering to essential mission requirements of customers effectively.

data.title: Green Plains (NASDAQ:GPRE) to announce Q4 2025 results on Feb 5, 2026, hosting earnings call at 9am EST. Dial 888.210.4215.
data.description: Green Plains Inc. (NASDAQ:GPRE) from Omaha, Nebraska is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 5, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call will follow at 9 a.m. Eastern time (8 a.m. Central time) on the same day to review the outcomes and future projections. To join the call, domestic participants can dial 888.210.4215, while international participants can dial 646.960.0269, both referencing conference ID 5027523. Interested individuals are encouraged to participate.

data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on January 21, 2026, Raymond James Financial, Inc. (NYSE: RJF) revealed its anticipated schedule for earnings releases and conference calls for fiscal year 2026. The financial results are scheduled to be unveiled around 4:15 p.m. Eastern time, followed by live conference calls starting at approximately 5:00 p.m. Eastern time for the first, second, third, and fourth quarters of the year. These crucial updates will occur on specified dates as follows:
Metals are flashing warning signs. Gold and silver point to fiscal stress, currency debasement, and geopolitics. That wall of worry may be what is quietly holding markets back.

data.title: Universal Corp (NYSE:UVV) appoints Anubhav Mittal as CFO, effective Feb 17, 2026. Mittal brings 20 years of experience.
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia, Universal Corporation (NYSE: UVV) revealed the selection of Anubhav Mittal as their new Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer (CFO), starting on February 17, 2026. With over two decades in finance, corporate strategy, and business, Mr. Mittal's appointment finalizes the CFO search. This move marks a significant development for the leading global agriproducts company.

data.title: Equifax (NYSE: EFX) to release Q4 2025 results on Feb 4, 2026, at 6:30 a.m. ET with conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.
data.description: Equifax (NYSE: EFX) is set to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, through a press release scheduled for Wednesday, February 4, at 6:30 a.m. Eastern Time (ET). Following this, a conference call will be conducted at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to further discuss the results.

data.title: IFF to report Q4 & full year 2025 results on Feb 11, 2026. Will present at 2026 CAGNY conference on Feb 19.
data.description: IFF (NYSE:IFF) has revealed it will unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 after the closing of the market on Wednesday, February 11, 2026. A live webcast is scheduled to take place on Thursday, February 12, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET where the management team will engage with investors to discuss the outcomes and future prospects. Furthermore, IFF's management is set to present at the Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) conference on Thursday, February 19, 2026, at 1:00 p.m., highlighting the company's progress and strategies.

data.title: BigBear.ai acquires CargoSeer assets, enhancing AI capabilities for security missions globally.
data.description: BigBear.ai, a prominent provider of AI solutions for national security, has revealed the acquisition of select technologies from CargoSeer, Ltd., a specialist AI software firm catering to cargo scanning improvement and trade risk management for customs enforcement operations globally. The undisclosed deal encompasses CargoSeer’s AI Shipment Inspection Platform, which bolsters Non-Intrusive Inspection (NII) to elevate the handling of cargo. BigBear.ai, listed on NYSE as BBAI, continues to expand its capabilities in the national security sector through strategic acquisitions.
